class.name: JustAMCPPrompt
class.brief_description: Abstract virtual class mapping native extensible generic MCP Prompt definitions.
class.description: This core base abstraction establishes the standardized interface needed to dynamically inject prompts directly into the Model Context Protocol bindings natively on the server. By inheriting from [JustAMCPPrompt], classes seamlessly integrate over iterative registries using [method JustAMCPPromptExecutor.add_prompt].

method.name: complete
method.description: Processes any auto-complete queries requested iteratively directly by the MCP pipeline natively mapping argument fragments matching schema keys dynamically across execution loops.

method.name: get_messages
method.description: Executes the actual logic rendering out dynamically formatted textual block bindings or templates specifically constructed based on passed argument constraints dynamically mapped via contexts safely.

method.name: get_name
method.description: Returns the strict system name defining this exact prompt externally safely explicitly routing lookups.

method.name: get_prompt
method.description: Returns the raw dictionary structural definitions parsing constraints securely spanning name, description, and list boundaries externally routing mappings across the graph securely!
